source.description: Built-in image generation contact sheet reviewed before cropping; approved final panel is saved as the finished raster artwork.
source.notes: All step frames should be cropped from the same generated contact sheet so the pancake stack, plate, butter pat, syrup drips, berries, color, and shadow stay consistent.

process_strategy: Use one six-panel contact sheet that builds the pancake stack from guide ellipses to layered cakes, plate, butter, syrup, berries, restrained color, and final keeper-line strength.

final_elements.name: stacked pancake ellipses
final_elements.description: Three slightly uneven pancake layers built from soft horizontal ellipses.

final_elements.name: plate oval
final_elements.description: A shallow oval plate underneath the pancake stack.

final_elements.name: uneven pancake edges
final_elements.description: Wobbly handmade edges that separate the three pancake layers.

final_elements.name: butter pat
final_elements.description: A small tilted square of butter sitting on the top pancake.

final_elements.name: syrup puddle and drips
final_elements.description: A loose syrup shape around the butter with two visible drips running down the pancake sides.

final_elements.name: small berries
final_elements.description: A few simple round berries placed near the pancakes and on the plate.

final_elements.name: pancake spots and crumb texture
final_elements.description: Small freckles, browned spots, and short crumb marks on the pancake surfaces.

final_elements.name: warm tan, golden, and berry color
final_elements.description: Restrained colored-pencil tan pancakes, golden syrup and butter, and blue-purple berries.

final_elements.name: soft cast shadow
final_elements.description: A pale graphite shadow grounding the plate.

frames.visible_job: Stacks three light horizontal ellipses to set the pancake height and tilt.
Turns the guide ellipses into uneven pancake layers and adds the shallow plate oval below.
Places the butter pat on top, draws a syrup puddle around it, and pulls two syrup drips down the stack.
Adds simple round berries on the plate and near the pancake stack without changing the main silhouette.
Adds pancake freckles and crumb texture, light tan and golden color, berry color, and a soft cast shadow.
introduces: warm tan, golden, and berry color

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing pancake, plate, butter, syrup, berry, texture, color, and shadow marks without adding new parts.
allowed_changes: paper texture from the saved contact sheet

rejection_checks: No pancake layer, plate, butter pat, syrup drip, berry, texture mark, shadow, or core color choice should first appear in the final image.
The pancake stack must keep the same centered three-quarter plate pose and proportions in every frame.
The final image must not add utensils, faces, hands, background scenery, or extra toppings absent from the process frames.
Do not use separately prompted step images that drift from this contact sheet.
